title: Remove
text:
---
title: Removing a node
description: Removing a node from the cluster
---

:::caution
This page contains administrative documentation intended for cluster administrators and operators. This content may not be relevant for regular users.
:::




import { Steps } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

:::note
These instructions are for nodes being temporary or permanently removed from the cluster.
:::

<Steps>

    1. Drain the node. **Check all pods except the system ones are gone**.

    2. Check that all storage volumes are successfully unmounted from the node (both `lsblk` devices and k8s volumeattachments)

    3. Check **in linstor controller pod** that [no linstor volumes exist on the node (even diskless ones)](/documentation/admindocs/storage/linstor/#cleaning-up-a-node).

    4. Do `kubeadm reset` on the node

    5. Delete the node from the k8s cluster

    6. Delete the node from ansible inventory

    7. Add a note to netbox
</Steps>
